executive_summary.problem: Current marceausolutions.com website messaging bundles 'Website + AI Automation' as a single offering, but the new business model is 'Tiered AI Automation with OPTIONAL website integration'. The pricing page already has automation-only tiers, but the homepage and messaging don't clearly communicate this flexibility.
executive_summary.solution: Reposition website messaging to lead with tiered AI automation, make website integration clearly optional, and ensure all messaging aligns with retainer plans (Partner and Maintenance).
executive_summary.business_value: Clear messaging that matches actual business model increases conversion by eliminating confusion about what customers must purchase. Prospects with existing websites won't be turned away by bundled messaging.
success_metrics: Homepage clearly presents AI automation tiers FIRST
Website integration positioned as optional add-on
All CTAs direct to appropriate pricing tier

homepage_analysis.current_headline: Website + AI Automation For Local Service Businesses
homepage_analysis.issue: Bundles website and automation in headline, implying both are required
current_messaging: Stop losing customers to missed calls and manual processes
Get a professional website plus intelligent automation
what_works: Early access form captures leads effectively
Clean, modern design with good UX
what_needs_change: Headline bundles website + automation (should lead with automation)
Subheadline says 'Get a professional website plus...' (should be 'automation with optional website')
Project cards (Fitness, Interview, Amazon, MedTech) don't align with local service business focus
No mention of tiered pricing or retainer options
No clear path to 'automation-only' for existing website owners

pricing_analysis.current_headline: Complete Website + Automation For Local Service Businesses
pricing_analysis.issue: Still positions as bundled offering in main section, though automation-only section exists at bottom

structure.section_1: Bundled Tiers (Digital Storefront $4,997, Growth System $9,997, Enterprise $19,997)

what_needs_change: Automation-only section buried at bottom (should be promoted)
Unclear navigation - should let user choose 'I have a website' upfront
Retainers could be more prominent (they're key to revenue model)

contact_analysis.issue: Interest dropdown still references old projects (Fitness, Interview, Amazon, MedTech) instead of AI automation tiers
what_needs_change: Update interest dropdown to match new service tiers
Add option for 'automation-only' vs 'bundled with website'

video_investigation.explanation: The word 'video' appears twice in pricing.html as text: '2-hour training + video library' (feature description). There are no <video>, <iframe>, or embedded video elements in any of the website files. The user's concern about a broken video is likely a false alarm or refers to a different page not yet examined.

target_state_vision.new_homepage_headline: AI Automation That Runs Your Business 24/7
target_state_vision.new_homepage_subheadline: Tiered AI automation for local service businesses. Voice AI, lead capture, follow-ups, CRM. Website included if you don't have one.
new_value_proposition: Lead with automation capabilities (Voice AI, booking, quotes, follow-ups)
Website is a bonus, not the focus
Retainer plans positioned as growth partnerships

stories.title: Verify No Broken Videos (Investigation Complete)
stories.description: User mentioned 'the video doesn't work on one of the pages' - investigate and fix if found
acceptance_criteria: Search all HTML files for <video>, <iframe>, embedded video elements
If broken video found, either fix embed or remove
Document findings

investigation_result.findings: The word 'video' only appears as text in pricing.html: '2-hour training + video library' (lines 505, 777). No actual video elements exist. No action needed.
investigation_result.conclusion: User's concern about broken video is likely a false alarm or refers to a page not yet examined. No fixes required.
